body:
### User Story
As a user of the portfolio OS, I want the desktop icon text to have a drop shadow so that it matches the Windows 95/98 aesthetic and is more readable against different wallpapers.

### Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Implement a drop shadow effect on all desktop icon text labels.
- [ ] The drop shadow should be "harsh" and "not diffuse," matching the Windows 95/98 style.
- [ ] The shadow should be a 1px offset (e.g., 1px down, 1px right).
- [ ] The shadow color should be the correct Windows 95/98 shadow color, or **pure black (#000000)** if the former is not applicable.

### Technical Notes
- Use the CSS `text-shadow` property: `text-shadow: 1px 1px 0px #000;`. 
- Ensure the shadow is sharp (0px blur radius).
title: [Feature]: Desktop icon text drop shadows
